title: Clocked In
description: Complete your first run, whatever the outcome.

title: Shipped
description: Win your first run. The sprint is closed.

title: Legendary PM
description: Win with a Legendary grade.

title: Safety First
description: Win with Risk/Compliance at 1 or below.

title: Speed Demon
description: Win with Delivery Speed at 90 or above.

title: Team Player
description: Win with Team Health at 9 or above.

title: Trust Builder
description: Win with Stakeholder Trust at 9 or above.

title: Quality Obsessed
description: Win with Model Quality at 9 or above.

title: Balanced Portfolio
description: Win with all 4 positive stats at 6 or above.

title: Comeback Kid
description: Win after having 2 or more stats critical simultaneously.

title: Scope Creep Survivor
description: Trigger the scope overflow event and still win.

title: Tech Debt Defused
description: Let the Tech Debt Bomb explode and still win.

title: Boss Slayer
description: Defeat at least one boss encounter.

title: Demo Day Champion
description: Win the Demo Day boss encounter.

title: Incident Commander
description: Win the Model Incident boss encounter.

title: Security Cleared
description: Pass the Enterprise Procurement & Security Review.

title: Triple Threat
description: Defeat all 3 boss encounters in a single run.

title: Max Level
description: Reach level 10 in a single run.

title: Veteran PM
description: Complete 10 total runs.

title: Scope Defender
description: Win a run without ever choosing a scope-creep option.
